calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Rod Thompson: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Bill Sumski, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Davis Realty Company, Inc.
Attorney, Francisco G. Torres representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Khamko Daoheuang is present.
Attorney, Benjamin Moore representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 57 Taylor Street, #106, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of JUL-27-2009 is vacated.
